text:
Jikkyō Powerful Pro Yakyū (実況パワフルプロ野球, Jikkyō Pawafuru Puro Yakyū), also known as Power Pros (パワプロ, Pawapuro) is a baseball video game series created by Konami.

Gameplay

Hunter × Hunter Collaboration

There have been two collaborations with Hunter × Hunter.

First Collaboration

Second Collaboration

The second collaboration was available from September 15th, 2022 to October 17th, 2022.
